pinpoint.campaign.inappmessagebutton.And.Docs: An object that defines the default behavior for a button in in-app messages sent to Android.

pinpoint.campaign.inappmessagebutton.Def.Docs: An object that defines the default behavior for a button in an in-app message.

pinpoint.campaign.inappmessagebutton.IOS.Docs: An object that defines the default behavior for a button in in-app messages sent to iOS devices.

pinpoint.campaign.inappmessagebutton.Web.Docs: An object that defines the default behavior for a button in in-app messages for web applications.
